When to use:

Secure Vue and browser-facing applications against XSS, unsafe HTML, token exposure, CSRF, and client-side secret leakage. Use when reviewing frontend auth flows, rendering user content with v-html, storing tokens, or hardening SPA security in Vue 3 apps.
